title: Disney Encanto Journal Diary with Lock Keys Pom Pom Pen Girls Ages 3 and Up
description:
This adorable hardcover Disney Encanto journal locking diary journal features vibrant colors and some of your little one's favorite members of the gifted family, The Madrigals, like Mirabel, Luisa, and Antonio! The easy-to-use secret journal is perfect for keeping any young child’s secrets, memories, daily journals, drawings, and doodles safe under lock and key. Along with the 60-sheet diary, lock, and two keys, this diary also comes with a pink pom-pom writing pen, making it a complete diary set. Your budding artist or little poet can discover their own gifts through art and writing while being sure no brother or sister sibling will catch a glimpse of his or her creative work with this Encanto diary.

Key Features

  • DIARY FOR GIRLS: Disney Encanto 60 sheet locking hardcover journal diary with pom-pom pen is a safe spot little girls can keep their secrets, memories, drawings, and doodles and practice writing too; The diary features favorite characters from Encanto like Mirabel, Luisa, Isabella, and Antonio and comes with a lock and two keys
  • TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Little Disney Encanto fans can easily take all their thoughts on the go! This lightweight travel journal is also ideal for trips to Disneyland or Disneyworld to collect autographs and signatures from all their favorite Disney characters!
  • DIARY WITH LOCK: Your budding artist or little poet can be assured no brother or sister sibling will catch a glimpse of his or her colorings, drawings, notes, or secrets with the included lock and two silver keys
  • STOCKING STUFFERS: This Encanto locking notebook is an ideal gift for girls to pass the time and practice drawing, writing down their thoughts or a favorite song, journaling, doodling, and more; the vibrant Encanto secret diary makes a perfect stocking stuffer, birthday or Christmas gift or party favor
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6.75 x .75 x 10.5 inches; Weight: .4lbs; Color: Multi; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: DPOMDENC1
  • UPC: 191537133085

The Disney Encanto diary for girls is lightweight and great for travel! One of the best parts about the hardcover journal is that little ones can immediately document family memories while on the go, helping to boost writing and communication skills. Are you traveling to a Disney Park in the near future? Kids can easily take this lightweight travel journal with them to collect autographs and signatures from all their favorite Disney characters on their next Disneyland or DisneyWorld adventure, making the diary a treasured keepsake for years to come.

A great educational learning tool to encourage toddlers and kids to write, doodle, draw and be creative, but with privacy, if they are not ready to share their ideas with the world. This Encanto locking notebook is an ideal gift for any child to pass the time and practice drawing, writing down their thoughts or a favorite song, journaling, and more; the Encanto diary with lock makes a perfect stocking stuffer, Christmas gift, birthday gift, or party favor!
